title: SCP-031, What is Love?
description: A strange entity disguised as love, waiting to lure you into its deadly embrace.
body:
What is love adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-031, also known as What is love.


SCP-031 disguises itself as a human female, looking directly at players to catch their attention. If a player approaches it, it stops walking, giggling, and displays a message to lure the player in. At 14 blocks or less, it inflicts the Love effect, surrounding both the player and SCP-031 with heart particles. Within very close distance, it stops again, motivating the player to give it a kiss, but this is just a trap. If a player gets closer, SCP-031 reveals its true form and attacks the player and propably even kill it.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Can SCP-031 disguises itself also into other people?

No. There is only one skin for SCP-031 to disguises itself, since the mod doesnt know what you really love, so I decided to give it only one skin.

► Who is the Girl SCP-031 disguises itself?

SCP-031 disguises itself into something the victim loves and since the mod cannot look into your brain and knows what you love, I decided to make someone I and a lot of other people like and No it's not that girl you think it is...

It's someone from my backstory which also can appear in The Clone Mod.

► Where does SCP-031 spawn?

SCP-031 can spawn on the overworld surface like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instancs of SCP-031.

</details>



![SCP-031](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d67f95fba4ac227100f8e2f369a43ed8d6e52e3.png)

SCP-031 spawns only once on the surface, camouflaged as a girl. It lures in players by watching them and giggling when they come close. If a player gets within 16 blocks, SCP-031 will stop moving, changing it's pose and giggling with the message "Hey Player, it's me, come closer" and within 14 block range, it will move again towards the player and apply a unique Love effect that surrounds both with pink hearts and a pink overlay. At 5 block range, SCP-031 will stop moving again, changing it pose and giggling again with the message "Step closer and give me a kiss". If you go closer, it reveals its monstrous form which will stun the player for 2 seconds. In this form, it is slow and leaves oil-like particles behind it. Attacking disables movement for 2 seconds and inflicts Nausea, Darkness, and a powerful Wither effect, making survival almost impossible.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
